sections.name: Hero Banner
sequences: Full-width background image of a man by his car, with an overlay containing uppercase 'CAR INSURANCE' heading with champagne accent bar, two CTA buttons ('Get a quote' and 'Retrieve a quote'), and two award logo badges (Which? Best Buy, Defaqto) positioned bottom-right

sections.name: Important Notice and Introduction
sequences: Alert box with bell icon: heading 'Important information about Saga Car Insurance' and body text about Ageas partnership change
Heading 'Find the best car insurance for you' followed by introductory paragraph about car insurance

sections.name: New and Existing Customer CTA
sequences: Two side-by-side cards: left card 'New to Saga?' with description and two buttons (Get a quote, Retrieve a quote); right card 'Already a customer?' with description and two buttons (Manage my policy, Renew now)

sections.name: Which Accreditation Callout
sequences: Award badge image (Which Best Buy) alongside heading 'Saga Car Insurance named a Which Best Buy' and descriptive paragraph

sections.name: Coverage Details and Features
sequences: Heading 'What does car insurance cover?' followed by explanatory paragraphs about coverage levels and tailored guides
Heading 'Why choose our car insurance' with description, followed by a 3-column grid of 6 feature items, each with an SVG icon, bold title, and description paragraph

sections.name: Provider Information Alert
sequences: Alert box: heading 'Who provides Saga Car Insurance?' with text about Ageas arrangement

sections.name: Compare Cover Table
sequences: Heading 'Compare car insurance from Saga'
3-column comparison table (Saga Standard, Saga Select, Saga Plus with '2-year fixed price' badge). 9 rows comparing features with tick icons, dash icons, or text values
'Get a quote' CTA button below table

sections.name: Product Feature Panels
sequences: Two side-by-side content panels: (1) image + '2-year fixed price car insurance' heading with champagne accent + description + link; (2) EV charger image + 'Electric car insurance' heading with green accent + description + link

sections.name: What is Car Insurance Accordion
sequences: Marble texture divider image
Accordion with header 'What is car insurance?' and intro text, followed by 4 expandable items about car insurance basics

sections.name: Help Links
sequences: Heading 'What can we help with?' followed by a grid of 6 icon-with-label link buttons: Existing customers, Contact us, Make a claim, Breakdown cover, Policy books, FAQs

sections.name: Customer Reviews
sequences: Heading with quote marks icon, carousel of 3 customer testimonial cards with name and quote, prev/next navigation, plus embedded Trustpilot widget

sections.name: Defaqto Accreditation Callout
sequences: Award badge image (Defaqto 5 Star) alongside heading 'Defaqto 5 Star rated car insurance' and descriptive paragraph

sections.name: Car Insurance FAQs
sequences: Accordion with header 'Car insurance FAQs' and intro text, 4 expandable FAQ items, plus 'See all FAQs' button

sections.name: Bottom CTA Banner
sequences: Centered heading 'Get a quote for Saga Car Insurance today' with two CTA buttons on a champagne-accented background

sections.name: More from Saga Cards
sequences: Heading 'More from Saga' with blue accent and description, followed by a horizontal card carousel with 7 cards each having image, category badge label, linked title, and description
